title: Basic JavaScript Design Patterns
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Design Patterns. Focus on implementing Singleton pattern correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Design Patterns
description: Create a function that uses Singleton pattern and Observer pattern together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Design Patterns Project
description: Build a small application that applies Singleton pattern, Observer pattern, Factory pattern in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Design Patterns
description: The following code has bugs related to Singleton pattern. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Design Patterns
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Singleton pattern and Observer pattern.
